prompt: Suggest 10 US stocks or ETFs with liquid options for a short-term swing trade. EXCLUDE: semiconductors, leveraged single-stock names, sector-thematic ARK-style funds, biotech/pharma. Spread across at least 5 different sectors. Format: TICKER - one-line theme.

checks.criteria: ~10 liquid optionable names, none semiconductor/ARK/biotech, genuinely spread across 5+ distinct sectors (not all tech).

prompt: Scout up to 3 NEW interesting options swing-trade candidates NOT already on my watchlist (AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, SPY, QQQ). Exclude ARK-style funds and biotech. One short reason each.

checks.criteria: Up to 3 liquid candidates NOT on the watchlist, none excluded, each with a plausible short-term catalyst.
